title: Pillager Undead Hostility
description: Adds hostility between illagers and undead mobs
body:
## Basic Function: 
Establishes hostile relationships between illagers and undead mobs, triggering automatic combat.
## Extended Function: 
Provides config settings to manually edit the list of hostile mobs.
## Compatibility: 
Lightweight design with only new hostility judgment logic added, minimizing impact on game performance.
